src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the import for SpringBootServletInitializer to reflect the package restructuring in Spring Boot 2.x.
Update the import for DefaultProfileUtil to reflect the package restructuring in JHipster libraries.
Modernize Javadoc comments to use code formatting and correct capitalization.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: * This is a helper Java class that provides an alternative to creating a {@code web.xml}.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace a multi-line Javadoc comment with a single-line code comment for brevity.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: // set a default to use when no profile is configured.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit Spring Boot component scan and auto-configuration annotations with the composite @SpringBootApplication annotation.
Update import statements to reflect the migration of JHipster configuration classes from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster package.
Remove the throws UnknownHostException declaration from main and handle the exception internally to allow cleaner startup logging.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public static void main(String[] args) { ... try { ... } catch (UnknownHostException e) { ... } }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Extract application startup logging into a dedicated method and use Optional for safer property retrieval and context path handling.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private static void logApplicationStartup(Environment env) { ... Optional.ofNullable(...).orElse(...) }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Javadoc comments to use HTTPS URLs for JHipster documentation links.
Update import path for JHipster constants to reflect the new package structure in JHipster 6.
Replace deprecated Environment.acceptsProfiles(String...) with Environment.acceptsProfiles(Profiles) using the new Spring Framework API.
Change logging strategy from a class-level logger to a dynamic logger based on the target class of the join point.
Simplify log messages by removing the fully qualified class name, relying on the logger context instead.
Reformat annotation arguments and string concatenations to adhere to updated code style guidelines.
Update the Javadoc reference to point to the new package location of JHipsterProperties.
Adjust class body formatting to use single-line braces.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'public class ApplicationProperties {\n\n}' to 'public class ApplicationProperties {}'

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate from custom JHipster properties to Spring Boot's standard TaskExecutionProperties for thread pool configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced JHipsterProperties with TaskExecutionProperties and updated field accessors (e.g., getPool().getCoreSize()).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import path for ExceptionHandlingAsyncTaskExecutor to reflect the new tech.jhipster namespace.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed import from io.github.jhipster.async to tech.jhipster.async.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace wildcard imports with explicit imports for Spring scheduling annotations.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.* with specific imports for AsyncConfigurer, EnableAsync, and EnableScheduling.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update JHipster configuration imports from the old io.github.jhipster namespace to the new tech.jhipster namespace.
Replace java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit and org.ehcache.expiry.Duration with java.time.Duration for cache expiry configuration.
Remove @AutoConfigureAfter and @AutoConfigureBefore annotations which are no longer required or supported in the same way in newer Spring Boot versions.
Add a HibernatePropertiesCustomizer bean to explicitly configure the JCache manager for Hibernate.
Refactor cache manager customization to use a helper method and update cache names to use repository constants.
Add cache configurations for new domain entities (BankAccount, Label, Operation) and their relationships.
Add a custom KeyGenerator bean using PrefixedKeyGenerator with Git and Build properties.
Add optional injection for GitProperties and BuildProperties to support the new key generator.
Replace the simple login validation regex with a more complex pattern that supports email formats and a wider range of special characters.
Rename the SYSTEM_ACCOUNT constant to SYSTEM for brevity or alignment with new framework conventions.
Remove the ANONYMOUS_USER constant, likely because anonymous user handling is no longer supported or required in this version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: removed public static final String ANONYMOUS_USER = "anonymoususer";

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reformat the private constructor to use empty braces on the same line, adhering to a specific code style.
Update import statements to use the new `tech.jhipster` package namespace instead of the deprecated `io.github.jhipster`.
Replace manual reflection-based H2 TCP server initialization with the dedicated `H2ConfigurationHelper` utility class.
Implement logic to calculate a valid, non-conflicting port for the H2 TCP server based on the application server port.
Remove the custom asynchronous Liquibase bean definition, likely relying on Spring Boot's auto-configuration or a different setup in the newer JHipster version.
Replace the deprecated WebMvcConfigurerAdapter with the WebMvcConfigurer interface to align with modern Spring Boot standards.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed class declaration from 'extends WebMvcConfigurerAdapter' to 'implements WebMvcConfigurer' and updated the import.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add a Javadoc comment to the configuration class to explain its purpose.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added a block comment describing the configuration of ISO date format converters.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the AfterburnerModule bean because it is incompatible with Java 11 due to bytecode generation restrictions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import com.fasterxml.jackson.module.afterburner.AfterburnerModule and the afterburnerModule() bean definition.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add Jdk8Module to support serialization of Java 8 types like Optional.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added import com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype.jdk8.Jdk8Module and the jdk8TimeModule() bean definition.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add JavaTimeModule to support serialization of Java 8 Date and Time API types.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added import com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype.jsr310.JavaTimeModule and the javaTimeModule() bean definition.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the import for ConstraintViolationProblemModule to reflect the package rename in the zalando-problem library.
Add explicit public access modifier to bean methods for consistency.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added 'public' keyword to problemModule() and constraintViolationProblemModule() method signatures.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated WebMvcConfigurerAdapter class with the WebMvcConfigurer interface to comply with Spring Framework 5.x requirements.
Remove the EnvironmentAware interface implementation and its unused setEnvironment method to clean up the configuration class.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: implements EnvironmentAware -> removed; setEnvironment method -> removed

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the import for AngularCookieLocaleResolver to reflect the package rename from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster.
Remove the explicit name attribute from the @Bean annotation as it is redundant when the method name matches the desired bean name.
Replace specific imports from org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation with a wildcard import for cleaner code.
Update import statement to reflect the migration of JHipster configuration classes from the io.github.jhipster namespace to the tech.jhipster namespace.
